note: Maps Anvil default test accounts to AttestRWA demo roles. The mnemonic 'test test test test test test test test test test test junk' is a publicly known Foundry test vector — never use these keys on a real network.
mnemonic_note: Standard Foundry / Hardhat dev mnemonic, public test vector

attester_dev.description: Signs EAS SettlementApproval attestations on the dev fork.

buyer_dev.description: Foreign buyer wallet that deposits Mock USDC into SettlementEscrow.

developer_treasury_siam_riverside.description: Verified payee wallet for Siam Riverside Living Co., Ltd. Released funds land here on the happy path.

wrong_payee_srl_holding_2026.description: Agent-claimed payee in the anchor case. NOT in developer authorized_payees. Used by the payee-mismatch-srl scenario to trigger an on-chain reject.

developer_treasury_bangkok_landmark.description: Verified payee wallet for Bangkok Landmark Group Public Co., Ltd.

shadow_bay_marketing_payee.description: Off-platform marketing-claimed payee. Not on the developer feed; settlements to this address will not get an attestation.

mixer_tainted_buyer_dev.description: Buyer wallet flagged with mixer history by wallet_taint mock. Triggers capital_class = red. Used by the capital-red-mixer-touch scenario.
